eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Beckham, OK; at 10:03 AM ON MAR 15, 2026 Effective until 12:03 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
At 11:42 am  a large and destructive wildfire was burning out of control 3 miles NNW of Sayre spreading rapidly SSE. Wildfires can damage or destroy structures and can harm or kill people and animals. For your safety EVACUATE IMMEDIATELY for Sayre  OK. Those North of East 1170 Rd and North 1880 Rd should LEAVE this area NOW to avoid injury or death. Do not delay to pack belongings. Reunification Center is setting up at Sayre Public Schools.
Roads in the area may be impacted by fire and smoke. Never drive into heavy smoke. SLOW DOWN & MOVE OVER for emergency vehicles.
